message:
fix(tui): increase help view test buffer height to fit all 35 content lines

The non-compact help text has 35 lines but the test buffer was 32 rows
(30 inner after border). Increase to 40 rows so all views including
"8. Timeline" are visible in the rendered buffer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
